summary: Landing Page V2 Dark Atmospheric Rebuild - Complete frontend testing. All 8 sections render correctly with dark background (#080612). All CTA buttons navigate to /signup, login link navigates to /login, and login flow works with test credentials. App routes (dashboard, login, signup) remain in light mode as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPageV2.tsx correctly implements dark atmospheric design with inline styles for dark-specific colors

All data-testid attributes present for key elements: landing-nav, nav-login, nav-cta, hero-section, hero-headline, hero-cta-primary, hero-cta-secondary, problem-section, features-section, testimonials-section, urgency-section, urgency-cta, final-cta-section, final-cta-btn, footer, countdown-timer, screenshot-dashboard
CountdownTimer uses .landing-countdown wrapper for dark mode style overrides - working correctly
Scroll reveal animations working with IntersectionObserver
Marquee animation for social proof section working
Floating activity pills visible on desktop with landing-float animation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page V2 dark atmospheric rebuild is complete and working. All 8 sections verified: Hero, Social Proof Marquee, Problem, Workflow, Features, Testimonials, Urgency/Beta Pricing, Final CTA, Footer. Cookie consent banner may overlay - dismiss with Accept All button. Console shows 401 errors which are expected (auth API calls when not logged in).

Sticky_Nav.details: Nav renders with KOLOR wordmark, nav links (Features, Pricing, Stories, Changelog), Log in link, Start free CTA

Hero_Section.details: Announcement pill, H1 with purple gradient on 'your best work', subheadline, two CTA buttons, trust line all present

Dashboard_Product_Frame.details: Browser chrome bar with traffic lights, sidebar with KOLOR logo and nav items, main content with stats and mini table with 3 rows

Floating_Activity_Pills.details: Quote accepted, New inquiry, Contract signed pills visible on desktop

Social_Proof_Marquee.details: Scrolling marquee with creative industry categories

Problem_Section.details: 73% featured card and 4 pain cards (Spreadsheet chaos, Double bookings, Quote paralysis, The follow-up you forgot)

Workflow_Section.details: 3 steps: Capture the lead, Send the quote, Close the booking with connector arrows

Features_Section.details: Hero screenshot in chrome frame + 3 feature cards (Lead Management, Quote Builder, Online Contracts)

Testimonials_Section.details: Featured card (Sophie L.) and stacked cards (James M., Nadia D.) + 3 bottom quotes (Marcus T., Priya S., Léa K.)

Urgency_Section.details: Countdown timer, Free tier ($0 with 3 spots remaining badge), Paid tier ($9/mo)

Final_CTA.details: 'So do you.' in purple gradient, Start building your studio button

Login_Flow.details: Login with bookingtest@test.com / password123 redirects to /dashboard

App_Routes_Light_Mode.details: Login, signup, dashboard pages have light background (rgb(249, 247, 254))

Console_Errors.details: Only 401 errors from auth API calls when not logged in - expected behavior
